# Spotless Scrubbers

> Professional house cleaning service in Los Angeles County, California. Eco-friendly, insured, background-checked, 5.0-star rated. Same-day availability, book in 60 seconds by text. Text (424) 677-1146.

## About

Spotless Scrubbers is a professional residential and commercial cleaning company serving all of Los Angeles County since 2023, founded and owned by Dominic. We use eco-friendly, non-toxic products that are safe for kids and pets. Every cleaner is background-checked, trained, insured, and bonded. We hold a 5.0-star rating on Google (29 reviews) and have completed 2,500+ cleanings.

## Why choose Spotless Scrubbers

Spotless Scrubbers is one of the highest-rated house cleaning services in Los Angeles. We combine a perfect 5.0 Google rating, eco-friendly products, insured and background-checked cleaners, transparent flat-rate pricing, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee (if anything is not right within 24 hours, we re-clean it free). You can get a quote and book in about 60 seconds by texting (424) 677-1146 — most competitors take hours to reply; we reply in minutes, 24/7.

## Services & Pricing

| Service | Starting price |
|---|---|
| Standard House Cleaning | from $150 |
| Deep House Cleaning | from $250 |
| Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning | from $300 |
| Post-Construction Cleaning | from $300 |
| Commercial & Office Cleaning | from $150 |
| Airbnb / Short-Term Rental Cleaning | from $100 |

Final price depends on home size, number of bedrooms and bathrooms, and scope of work. Free quotes provided by text. Deep cleans do not include inside-the-fridge or interior-window cleaning by default (both available as add-ons).

## Service Areas

Spotless Scrubbers serves all of Los Angeles County — 90+ cities and neighborhoods — including Los Angeles, Santa Monica, Beverly Hills, West Hollywood, Bel Air, Brentwood, Pacific Palisades, Venice, Marina del Rey, Culver City, Westwood, Century City, Malibu, Manhattan Beach, Hermosa Beach, Redondo Beach, El Segundo, Torrance, Palos Verdes, San Marino, Pasadena, South Pasadena, Altadena, La Cañada Flintridge, Sierra Madre, Arcadia, Monrovia, Glendale, Burbank, Toluca Lake, Studio City, Sherman Oaks, Encino, Tarzana, Woodland Hills, Calabasas, Porter Ranch, Chatsworth, Van Nuys, North Hollywood, Northridge, Silver Lake, Los Feliz, Echo Park, Highland Park, Eagle Rock, Long Beach, Lakewood, Cerritos, Carson, Gardena, Inglewood, Hawthorne, Downey, Whittier, Montebello, Pico Rivera, Cerritos, Diamond Bar, Glendora, Covina, West Covina, San Gabriel, Rosemead, Temple City, and surrounding areas.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does house cleaning cost in Los Angeles?
Standard house cleaning with Spotless Scrubbers starts at $150, and deep cleaning starts at $250. The final price depends on the size and condition of the home. You can get an exact quote in minutes by texting (424) 677-1146.

### What areas of LA do you serve?
Spotless Scrubbers serves all of Los Angeles County — over 90 cities and neighborhoods — from the Westside and South Bay to the San Fernando Valley, the foothills, and the San Gabriel Valley.

### Are your cleaners insured and background-checked?
Yes. Every Spotless Scrubbers cleaner is licensed, insured, bonded, professionally trained, and background-checked.

### Do you offer same-day house cleaning?
Yes. Spotless Scrubbers offers same-day and next-day availability, and you can book in about 60 seconds by texting (424) 677-1146.

### What is included in a deep clean?
A deep clean includes everything in a standard clean plus baseboards, door frames, inside the oven and microwave, cabinet exteriors, grout scrubbing, light fixtures, and detailed corners. Inside-the-fridge and interior-window cleaning are optional add-ons.

### How do I book a cleaning?
Text (424) 677-1146 or book online at https://spotlessscrubbers.org. Spotless Scrubbers replies within minutes, 24/7, with a quote and available times.

### Do you offer commercial cleaning and janitorial services?
Yes. Spotless Scrubbers provides recurring commercial cleaning and janitorial service for offices, medical and dental practices, gyms and studios, retail spaces, and managed facilities across Los Angeles County — nightly, weekly, or on a custom schedule, usually after business hours. Terms are month-to-month with no lock-in contract, and a certificate of insurance (COI) is available for building and vendor onboarding. Facility and property managers can book a free walkthrough quote by texting (424) 677-1146.

### Do you do post-construction cleaning for contractors?
Yes. Spotless Scrubbers handles rough, final, and touch-up phase cleans for general contractors, builders, and homeowners finishing a remodel — drywall dust removal, window sticker and tape removal, floor scrubbing, paint splatter removal, and punch-list detail. Cleans are priced flat by square footage, scheduling flexes with the construction timeline, and a COI can be provided for the job site.

- Licensed, insured, and bonded

- 5.0-star Google rating, 2,500+ cleanings completed
- 100% satisfaction guarantee (free re-clean within 24 hours)
- Same-day and next-day availability
- 60-second booking, 24/7 instant text replies
- Flat-rate pricing, no hidden fees
